data.title: D.A. Davidson advised Cortina Tool & Molding Co. in its sale to Radial Equity Partners, merging it with Plasticade.
data.description: In Chicago, financial advisor D.A. Davidson & Co. facilitated the acquisition of Cortina Tool & Molding Co., a key traffic and work zone safety products manufacturer. The deal involved Cortina being bought by Radial Equity Partners, a private equity firm specializing in middle-market ventures. The acquisition will see Cortina merging with Plasticade, another Radial portfolio company. This move brings together two prominent brands in the traffic industry, solidifying their position in the market.

data.title: Green Brick Partners' communities recognized in top rankings nationally and in North Texas for 2025. #GRBK #JBREC #RCLCO
data.description: A homebuilding and land development company, Green Brick Partners, Inc. (NYSE: GRBK) based in Plano, Texas, disclosed that a number of its master-planned communities have been acknowledged as leading developments across the country and in North Texas. The company secured positions in two notable national rankings for the year 2025. This includes being listed on the John Burns Research and Consulting (JBREC) “Top 50 Master-Planned Communities Nationally” recognition as well as the RCLCO “Top 50 Master-Planned Communities” list.

data.title: QTL certifies 3 LED lighting families with EPDs in Milford: PERI, ESSENTIALS, MICRO 5. Helps sustainability decisions.
data.description: A lighting company based in Milford, Connecticut, QTL Lighting, revealed that its PERI, ESSENTIALS, and MICRO 5 LED lighting collections have obtained Environmental Product Declarations (EPDs) through third-party certification. These three product lines are now part of QTL's increasing number of solutions with EPDs. This achievement aids architects, designers, and specifiers in making sustainable choices without sacrificing performance quality. EPDs are comprehensive reports that outline a product's carbon footprint throughout its entire life cycle.
US Industrial Production YoY Actual 2% (Forecast -, Previous 2.52%)

data.title: Employee elected to Ecopetrol's Board as per government nomination, Cesar Eduardo Loza Arenas chosen by employees.
data.description: The Colombian company ECOPETROL S.A. has announced on January 16, 2026, that Mr. Cesar Eduardo Loza Arenas has been elected by the employees as their candidate to the Board of Directors. Trading under the symbols BVC: ECOPETROL and NYSE: EC, Ecopetrol emphasized that this election aligns with its Articles of Association. The selection of Mr. Loza Arenas highlights the continued commitment of the workforce to shaping the company's leadership.

data.title: Dividend 15 Split Corp. issued preferred shares in successful overnight offering, featuring dividend-yielding Canadian companies.
data.description: A portfolio of Canadian companies with a focus on dividends and high quality is being highlighted. This selection includes companies that are known for their dividend yields. The emphasis is on Canadian businesses that have a reputation for consistently providing dividends to their investors. The portfolio's composition reflects a strong emphasis on quality and income generation. This strategy aims to attract investors seeking stable returns and income from their investments in Canadian markets.

data.title: Ouroboros to lead $60M Series A investment in Cytotheryx for liver disease cell therapy platform.
data.description: On January 16, 2026, Ouroboros Family Founders Fund I, LP revealed their plan to spearhead a $60 million Series A funding round for Cytotheryx, Inc. This company, focused on preclinical cell therapy, aims to revolutionize liver disease treatment. The substantial investment signifies a notable step forward for Cytotheryx, Inc. and the potential impact of their innovations in the field of medical solutions for liver ailments.

data.title: CobbleStone Software partners with LegalO2 to enhance contract ops and legal workflow. Announcement made in Princeton, NJ.
data.description: CobbleStone Software has recently revealed a fresh strategic services collaboration with Legal Outsourcing 2.0, Inc., operating as LegalO2, aimed at boosting contract operations, data accuracy, and legal workflow assistance for customers utilizing CLM solutions. This partnership was announced in Princeton, N.J., on January 16, 2026.

data.title: Big Chicken, founded by Shaquille O'Neal, introduces new monthly dips to enhance flavor experience.
data.description: In recent news, Shaquille O'Neal's renowned chicken brand, Big Chicken, has introduced monthly new dips that boast bold flavors. The NBA legend's chicken concept is known for its unapologetically flavorful offerings. The announcement was made in Las Vegas on January 16, 2026. This move marks a fresh beginning for Big Chicken, showcasing a commitment to delivering exciting and indulgent dips regularly. The brand's dedication to providing unique and delicious options is evident in this approach, aiming to captivate customers with its ever-evolving menu. Stay tuned for the latest in Big Chicken's flavorful journey!

data.title: John Travolta, Morgan Freeman, and Kenny G to headline 23rd Annual Living Legends of Aviation Awards in Beverly Hills on Jan. 16, 2026. Hollywood's biggest night in aviation.
data.description: The prestigious Living Legends of Aviation® Red Carpet event will be held at the Beverly Hilton in Beverly Hills, California on January 16, 2026. This will mark the 23rd Annual Living Legends of Aviation® Awards ceremony, bringing together Hollywood celebrities and pioneers in the aerospace industry. The event will showcase the achievements of notable individuals in aviation and honor their contributions to the field. The glamorous affair is set to highlight the intersection of entertainment and aerospace excellence, serving as a platform to celebrate innovation and talent.

data.title: SSP International, Inc. appoints Amy Hee Kim as Chief Program Officer, guiding the company's evolution. Del., Jan. 16, 2026.
data.description: Envision Consulting has successfully recruited a forward-thinking individual to lead SSP International. The appointment of Amy Hee Kim as the new Chief Program Officer at SSP International, Inc. was officially announced on January 16, 2026, in Wilmington, Del. As Kim steps into this role, she will be responsible for overseeing the progress and growth of the company moving forward.

data.title: Vilkyškių pieninė AB acquired 100% shares of Marijampolės pieno konservai UAB, completing the transaction on 16 Jan 2026.
data.description: Vilkyškių pieninė AB successfully acquired 100% of the shares of Marijampolės pieno konservai UAB, effectively gaining sole control of the company. The acquisition was approved by the Competition Council of the Republic of Lithuania on 13 November 2025. The Share Purchase and Sale Agreement, finalized on 16 January 2026, outlined all conditions necessary for the transaction to proceed. Vilkyškių pieninė AB has now completed the acquisition of Marijampolės pieno konservai UAB, solidifying its position in the market.

data.title: Tax refund may be confiscated if defaulted on student loans. Millions face risk of seizure by government for debt repayment.
data.description: Numerous individuals face the possibility of having their tax refunds taken by the government to cover outstanding student loan debts. The figure of individuals affected by this measure is in the millions, creating a significant impact on taxpayers dealing with student loan repayment.

data.title: Michael Saylor's Bitcoin strategy has hit a snag as his software company faces challenges amidst the crypto craze.
data.description: Michael Saylor's financial wizardry transformed Strategy, a typical software company, into a major player in the cryptocurrency craze. The strategy was a remarkable success, until recently.

data.title: Flowco launches "Built for the Journey" campaign, marking a defining moment post merger and IPO, one year after public debut.
data.description: Flowco, a leading energy production optimization and natural gas solutions provider based in Houston, revealed their inaugural unified brand campaign, Built for the Journey, to commemorate the one-year anniversary of their merger and IPO. The campaign signifies a significant milestone in the company's growth as a comprehensive partner in the energy sector. Flowco was established in 2024 following the consolidation of Estis Compression, Flowco Production Solutions (FPS), and Flogistix. This campaign launch showcases Flowco's commitment to innovation and excellence in the industry.
